♡ 𝓗𝒊𝒔 𝓚𝓲𝓷𝒅 𝓸𝒇 𝓒𝒂𝒓𝒆 ♡

𝓈𝑒𝑜 𝓂𝑜𝑜𝓃-𝒿𝑜

⋆.˚ ᡣ𐭩 .𖥔˚

Your cheeks were soaked in tears, but his thumbs wiped them away like he owned your sadness.

His voice? Gentle. Mocking. Dangerous.

A hand on your chin, lips grazing yours—

and the room behind you still smelled like blood.

❝ I’m not going to abandon you… you’re mine, jagiya. ❞
